name: Fresh Cherry Crunch
recipeInstructions:
Combine the crunch crust mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Pat 3/4 of the mixture into a 9 x 9 inch baking pan, reserving the remaining crumbs for the top, and set aside.
In a separate bowl, combine 3 cups Fresh cherries (pitted), 1 cup Granulated white sugar, 1 cup water, and 3 tbsp Cornstarch. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until thickened. Let cool slightly and stir in 1/2 tsp Pure Almond Extract.
Pour the filling onto the crumb mixture in the baking pan. If adding chocolate chips, sprinkle them over the filling before topping with remaining crumbs.
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. Bake for about 45 minutes, or until set.
When cool, cut into squares.
Note: This is a very rich dessert!
